channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran to prioritise ships paying 'costs of security' in Strait of Hormuz
- Iran's IRGC says Strait of Hormuz blocked
- Iran reasserts control of Hormuz Strait as Trump warns against ‘blackmail’
- Iran's IRGC says Strait of Hormuz blocked, demands end to U.S. naval blockade
- Iran military orders Indian ship to abort Strait of Hormuz passage
- Iran closes Hormuz Strait again, as Trump warns against ‘blackmail’
- Europe looks to secure shipping in Strait of Hormuz
- Iran proposes to restrict vessels posing military threat in Strait of Hormuz
- Iran warns ships near Hormuz will be treated as targets
- Iran shuts down Strait of Hormuz again, accusing US of ‘piracy’
- Iran to prioritise Strait of Hormuz passage for vessels that pay fees
- ‘Violating vessel will be targeted’: Iran says approaching Hormuz would be seen as ‘cooperation with enemy’
- Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz If US Continues Its Naval Blockade - IRGC
- Iran Reimposes Control of Strait of Hormuz and Fires on Tankers
- Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz as Iran Declares Strict Control of Vital Shipping Route

- Iran ‘reviewing new proposals’ put forward by U.S.; Trump says cannot ‘blackmail’ with Strait of Hormuz

- Iran Reimposes Control of Strait of Hormuz and Fires on Tankers
- In the End, the United States Must Acknowledge That Iran Is Inherently Bound to the Strait of Hormuz
- Trade ships hit in Hormuz as Iran reopening falters

- Urgent: Iran says enemy's blockade of Hormuz Strait violates ceasefire, will prevent conditional opening of Hormuz

- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again over US blockade
- Trade ships hit in Hormuz as Iran recloses strait
- Iran outlines Hormuz cost conditions after closure; Trump says Tehran can't 'blackmail' US
- Iran: Attacks on ships reported as Strait of Hormuz recloses
- Iran reimposes control over Strait of Hormuz as ships report gunfire
- Closed? Open? Closed? Why is Iran changing course on the Strait of Hormuz?
- Iran defends limits on Strait of Hormuz passage
- Iran's military says it has placed the Strait of Hormuz under strict control again
- Iran claims ‘strict control’ of Strait of Hormuz and says it will not be fully reopened
- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again over US blockade of its ports

- Trade ships hit in Hormuz as Iran reopening falters
- Iran shuts down Strait of Hormuz a day after reopening it amid US conflict. Here is why

- Vessels turn back in Strait of Hormuz as Iran restores control

- Iran reimposes restrictions on Strait of Hormuz, accusing US of violating deal to reopen it
- Iran claims ‘strict control’ of Strait of Hormuz and says it will not be fully reopened

- Iran reimposes restrictions on Strait of Hormuz, accusing US of violating deal to reopen it
- Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again over US blockade

- Iran reimposes restrictions on Strait of Hormuz, accusing U.S. of violating deal to reopen it
- Iran reimposes shipping restrictions on Strait of Hormuz

- Europe looks to secure shipping in Strait of Hormuz
- Iran threatens to again close Strait of Hormuz, if U.S. blockade continues
- Middle East crisis live: Iran warns it will close strait of Hormuz if US blockade continues
